items.subject: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.body: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

items.subject: ‘The cost of compute is far beyond the costs of the employee’: Nvidia executive says right now AI is more expensive than paying human workers
items.body: Big Tech has announced $740 billion in capex this year, but AI has yet to show evidence of widespread increased productivity.

items.subject: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.body: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

items.subject: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
items.body: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

items.subject: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.body: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.

items.subject: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.body: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.

items.subject: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.body: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.

items.subject: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.body: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.

summary:
Here are the key developments with insight:

**Bullet Points:**

* **OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation**: OpenAI has introduced a new method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data, aiming to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
* **NVIDIA XR AI in public beta**: NVIDIA's XR AI is now available in public beta, giving developers access to a platform that brings agents to AR glasses, enabling new use cases for augmented reality applications.
* **HPE AI Factory expands for agentic AI**: HPE has expanded its AI Factory to support the production of agentic AI, a form of AI that can take actions independently, marking a significant milestone in the adoption of AI in enterprises.
* **NVIDIA Blackwell sweeps MLPerf Training 6.0**: NVIDIA's Blackwell model has won the MLPerf Training 6.0 competition, setting a new benchmark for AI model training and demonstrating NVIDIA's leadership in AI innovation.
* **NVIDIA executive highlights cost of AI**: An NVIDIA executive has highlighted the high cost of AI, stating that the cost of compute is far beyond the costs of human workers, raising questions about the value proposition of AI adoption.

**Trend:**

* **Agentic AI adoption accelerates**: The news articles suggest a significant acceleration in the adoption of agentic AI, with HPE expanding its AI Factory to support the production of agentic AI models and OpenAI launching a Partner Network to accelerate enterprise AI adoption. This trend indicates a growing recognition of the potential of agentic AI to transform industries and enterprises.
